workstreams.name: Frontend
workstreams.description: Frontend (Basher, Tess) + Dev QA tests (Linus) — iOS/iPadOS UI, design system, feature surfaces, and the XCTest target.

workstreams.name: Backend
workstreams.description: Backend (Virgil) — iOS data layer: Networking, Contracts, Models, Services, and DI/composition root. Refers to the iOS-side data backend; the Python backend/ directory is mothballed in v1 and intentionally not covered by any stream.

workstreams.name: Strategy
workstreams.description: Strategy (Saul, Reuben, Yen, Frank, Turk, Nagel) — market research, legal, accessibility audits, App Store optimization, HIG compliance, API contract monitoring. Authors audit/research/legal/aso docs; reviewer-gate on UI and contract surfaces lives in routing.md, not here.
